case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. YLPR TRUCKING LLC DBA YLPR TRUCKING ADBA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210074353) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
